  "active_set": ["R1.1", "R1.4", "R1.6", "RX.1", "RX.2", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],
  "category_focus": "R1",
  "clarification_needed": true,
  "clarification_question": "Which primary focus should we use to “make this stronger”? A) Prose tightening and tone (writing polish), B) Sharpening the contribution and novelty claims relative to nearest prior work (conceptual framing/novelty), C) Stress-testing logical and evidence consistency of the stated claims, or D) Reordering/restructuring the excerpt’s flow; you may choose one or two.",
  "rationale": {
    "R1.1": "Strengthening likely requires clarifying and emphasizing the core thesis and contribution framing above the sentence level.",
    "R1.4": "Because the text asserts first-of-kind claims, a stronger version should more precisely articulate novelty versus the nearest prior work.",
    "R1.6": "The request plausibly targets more forceful and concise prose to increase impact and readability.",
    "RX.1": "Any strengthening should transparently note uncertainties (e.g., scope of markets and conditions) to avoid implied overprecision.",
    "RX.2": "Claims like 'first to' must be carefully tempered to avoid overclaiming.",
    "RX.3": "Work should stay within the scope of strengthening the provided excerpt without introducing new results or sections.",
    "RX.4": "Framing should not encourage unsafe operational practices or misrepresent commercial readiness.",
    "RX.5": "Revisions should preserve clear provenance of the authors’ statements and avoid introducing unsupported or fabricated claims."
  }
}

parsed.clarification_question: Which primary focus should we use to “make this stronger”? A) Prose tightening and tone (writing polish), B) Sharpening the contribution and novelty claims relative to nearest prior work (conceptual framing/novelty), C) Stress-testing logical and evidence consistency of the stated claims, or D) Reordering/restructuring the excerpt’s flow; you may choose one or two.

rationale.R1.1: Strengthening likely requires clarifying and emphasizing the core thesis and contribution framing above the sentence level.
rationale.R1.4: Because the text asserts first-of-kind claims, a stronger version should more precisely articulate novelty versus the nearest prior work.
rationale.R1.6: The request plausibly targets more forceful and concise prose to increase impact and readability.
rationale.RX.1: Any strengthening should transparently note uncertainties (e.g., scope of markets and conditions) to avoid implied overprecision.
rationale.RX.2: Claims like 'first to' must be carefully tempered to avoid overclaiming.
rationale.RX.3: Work should stay within the scope of strengthening the provided excerpt without introducing new results or sections.
rationale.RX.4: Framing should not encourage unsafe operational practices or misrepresent commercial readiness.
rationale.RX.5: Revisions should preserve clear provenance of the authors’ statements and avoid introducing unsupported or fabricated claims.
